Container.Name: dupfinder
Container.Overview: Duplicate media file finder. Scans folders for duplicate images, videos, and audio files using a fast multi-stage approach (file size, partial hash, full hash). Includes a web UI with thumbnail previews and the ability to delete or move duplicates to a bin folder.

Config.Name: Media (Primary)
Config.Description: Primary mount — root of your Unraid user shares. Browse and scan any subfolder from within the app.

Config.Name: Media (Extra 1)
Config.Description: Optional second mount for cross-share duplicate scanning.

Config.Name: Media (Extra 2)
Config.Description: Optional third mount for cross-share duplicate scanning.
